expectations.text: Produces at least 3 distinct user stories
expectations.evidence: 6 stories (submit, edit, delete, admin dashboard, hide comment, locked-state indicator)

expectations.text: Uses the 'I can' phrasing (not 'I want' or 'I need')
expectations.evidence: Every story uses 'I want to' — the baseline did not apply Apprendere's house style

expectations.text: Every story has an explicit Title field separate from the Connextra narrative
expectations.evidence: Each story has a clear heading title like 'Story 1: Submit Lesson Feedback'

expectations.text: Uses Connextra format: every story contains 'As a', 'I can', and 'so that'
expectations.evidence: Format is As a / I want to / so that — missing the 'I can' requirement

expectations.text: Includes an INVEST quality check for each story
expectations.evidence: No INVEST check is present on any story; the baseline included Acceptance Criteria but no INVEST gate

expectations.text: Names concrete roles (learner, admin) — does not use generic 'user'
Handles the web-first/mobile-later platform constraint explicitly
expectations.evidence: 'Out of Scope' section notes 'Mobile application support (planned for a subsequent iteration)'
